General: Send hero on the shortest adventure to get a horse. Then smash animals!

Put points in strength according to the amount of oasis you can raid.
0 oasis: max 2 points 
1-5 oasis: 8/12 points
6+ oasis: 12(+) points
Use the rewards to level up your hero to full health after smashing animals. Put the rest in resc production. 
The chances of using your hero for 24h are very small and putting some extra points in resc production helps generating more resc when your hero can't clear any oasis anymore.
Raid Oasis until you need to walk 1h+, of which you are sure you will clear the animals, after that considor to do adventure 2 (resc bounty). Adventure gives about 2300 resc.

Continue to raid oasis until 2h+ walkig time, then you should consider to put almost all points in resc production with the book of wisdom for hero. Book is obtained in adventure 6, usually comes within 24h after starting.

For farming it will be difficult to determine how many units to make. In the sheet we added some general calculations which can help to determine if you can make it profitable. 
Recommended numbers are: 
- 7 to 12 for Cavalry 
- 30 to 60 for Infantery. 
Timing of making units is also important, oasis only produce after all animals are killed. So to start with farming units right away is not recommended. Most efficient amount of farm units is situational. Base this number on touch and feel results on nearby oasis.
Important reminder: TT & EI can be sent solo to an empty oasis!

Check here which fields you want to upgrade based on ROI or invest more in farm units, bare in mind you already farm and get more resc income. Might be better to focus more on CP production, since that needs to go up anyway to make it in 4 parties. Nonetheless ROI for the fields 5 are:
Wood - 67,4h
Clay - 67,7h
Iron - 82,5h
Crop - 76,7h
ROI is calculated with the reward cashed with hero level 6. Iron mines are not recommended to do in any situation, but is a possibility.

To do: Don't forget about the 3k resc for launching!

General:
If you went like really fast, due to a good spawn or bossing it yourself, you might run into some CP related issues. Speeding up the process before party 1 results in less time where CP gets generated by the CP production. To cope with this below an overview of the cheaper CP per resc buildings. 
Some tips regarding upgrading your town hall are also included. It can be profitable to upgrade your town hall to get the CP from a party faster.
Pro tip: If resc income is more than you need and you have room for speeding up your settling time, check for upping your town hall to shorten the party duration and have CP of a party faster.
Important reminder: a party in queue will not be shortened in duration when upping TH. When upgrading CP (while having a party in queue) the increase will be given when next party starts.
